title: polygala brachytropis
intro: Polygala brachytropis, also known as Yuan Zhi, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the milkwort family. It is a traditional Chinese medicinal herb used for its adaptogenic and immunomodulatory properties. The plant is valued for its ability to enhance physical and mental well-being by reducing stress, improving sleep, and boosting the immune system. In traditional Chinese medicine, Polygala brachytropis is often prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture to promote relaxation, enhance cognitive function, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia.
